zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth De Montfort於1405年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾波斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas Mountfort25歲，母親Elizabeth Strangways23歲。她於1425年與John Piers Of Montague在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年8月24日在英國英格蘭享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth De Montfort于1405年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾波斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Mountfort25岁，母亲Elizabeth Strangways23岁。她于1425年与John Piers Of Montague在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年8月24日在英国英格兰享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth De Montfort was born in 1405, in Box, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Mountfort, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Strangways, was 23. She married John Piers Of Montague in 1425, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 24 August 1462, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth De Montfort est née en 1405, à Box, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Mountfort, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Strangways, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Piers Of Montague en 1425, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1462, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth De Montfort 1405 in Box, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Mountfort 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Strangways 23. Sie hat 1425 in Somerset, England John Piers Of Montague geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. August 1462 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Montfort è nata il nel 1405 nel Box, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Mountfort, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Strangways, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Piers Of Montague nel 1425, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 agosto 1462, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Montfortが1405年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアボックスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Mountfortは25歳，母Elizabeth Strangwaysは23歳であった。1425年にイギリスソメルセトでJohn Piers Of Montagueと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1462年8月24日にイギリスイギリスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Montfort(이)가 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 보스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Mountfort(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Strangways(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 서머세트에서 John Piers Of Montague(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Montfort nasceu em 1405, em Box, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Mountfort, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Strangways, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Piers Of Montague em 1425, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1462, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth De Montfort родилась в 1405 г. в местности бокс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Mountfort было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Strangways, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Piers Of Montague в 1425 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 24 августа 1462 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth De Montfort nació en 1405, en Box, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Mountfort, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Strangways, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Piers Of Montague en 1425, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1462, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
